name: Trade Flow Exhaustion (Pinnacle Threshold)
hypothesis: Following the feedback on iter017_exhaustion_extreme, this spec tests one final, more extreme threshold (z-score > 4.0) to definitively confirm the signal's conviction peak before exploring other mutation avenues. High z-scores in trade imbalance suggest buyer exhaustion, predicting a short-term price reversal (contra-signal).
mutation_note: Per feedback, applied one final tightening of the threshold from 3.5 to 4.0 to confirm the signal's conviction limit.
